html:
A Rotten Egg is produced by allowing an uncooked Egg to spoil. Unlike most foods, which turn to Rot when they spoil, Eggs become Rotten Eggs.

Rotten Eggs can be used to fertilize crops or as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit. Rotten Eggs can also be used to craft Gunpowder; an explosive which deals 200 damage and can destroy most structures.

Gathering

Eggs come from Birds imprisoned in Birdcages. Feeding the Bird any Meat (besides raw Monster Meat except in DST) will produce an Egg. Once the Egg is allowed to spoil, it will become a Rotten Egg.

Rotten Eggs can also be found lying on the ground in Pengull nesting areas at the end of Winter, a quick and safe way to obtain many Rotten Eggs.

“Ew! It stinks!”
–Wilson
“Ew! Why? Oh Why?!”
–Willow
“Stinky!”
–Wolfgang
“The way of all things.”
–Wendy
“I AM GLAD I CAN NOT SMELL”
–WX-78
“How unappetizing.”
–Wickerbottom
“One less bird. Good.”
–Woodie
“Disgusting. Why am I keeping this around?”
–Maxwell
“Smells sulfuric. Excellent!”
–Wagstaff
“Ruined för eating, but primed för battle.”
–Wigfrid
“Ew!”
–Webber
“Smells like a ship cabin.”
–Walani
“Pee-eew!”
–Warly
“Smells like crew quarters after chili night.”
–Woodlegs
“MMMM...SOMETHING ROTTEN”
–Wilba
“Smells good!”
–Wormwood
“Smells like sulphur. And sulphur goes boom.”
–Wheeler
“Yeesh, get a whiff of that. No wait, don't!”
–Winona
“A powerful stink. How fun!”
–Wortox
“Has good stink to it.”
–Wurt
“That's definitely gone off.”
–Walter
“It must've been the last one out.”
–Wanda
A Rotten Egg is produced by allowing an uncooked Egg to spoil. Unlike most foods, which turn to Rot when they spoil, Eggs become Rotten Eggs.
Rotten Eggs can be used to fertilize crops or as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit. Rotten Eggs can also be used to craft Gunpowder; an explosive which deals 200 damage and can destroy most structures.
Gathering[edit | edit source]
Eggs come from Birds imprisoned in Birdcages. Feeding the Bird any Meat (besides raw Monster Meat except in DST) will produce an Egg. Once the Egg is allowed to spoil, it will become a Rotten Egg.
Rotten Eggs can also be found lying on the ground in Pengull nesting areas at the end of Winter, a quick and safe way to obtain many Rotten Eggs.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trứng Thối được tạo ra bằng cách để Trứng chưa nấu chín bị hỏng. Không giống như hầu hết các loại thực phẩm, sẽ chuyển sang Thối khi chúng hư hỏng, Trứng sẽ trở thành Trứng Thối.
